Where Every Bead Tells a Story

Wholesale & retail semiprecious stones, cultured pearls, crystals, and jewelry supplies — plus professional repair. Over 20 years serving Miami’s makers and designers.

Our Collections

From semiprecious gemstones to cultured pearls and crystals — everything you need to create, from wholesale quantities to single strands.

Semiprecious Stone Beads
Agate, turquoise, jasper, amethyst & more — wholesale and retail, strands and loose

Freshwater pearls, Swarovski crystals, and glass beads in every color and shape

Full Pro Selection Shop Now

Why Miami’s Jewelers Choose Maslov

Over 20 years in the wholesale jewelry district — four reasons designers, crafters, and collectors keep coming back.

Global Sourcing

Founded in 1959 in South Africa, expanded globally. We attend trade shows worldwide to bring you the best stones at the best prices.

Genuine Quality

Every stone is authentic — no fakes, no synthetics unless labeled. We stake our 20-year reputation on it.

Professional Repair

Ring resizing, chain repair, stone replacement, restringing. Trusted by Miami jewelers for decades.

Gold & Silver Buying

We buy gold and silver at top payouts — bring in your old jewelry and walk out with cash, same day.

Repair & Gold Buying — In Store

Professional jewelry repair: ring resizing, chain repair, stone replacement. Gold & silver buying at top market rates. Walk in, no appointment needed.

What Our Customers Say

4.7 stars on Google · 53+ reviews from Miami jewelry makers, designers, and collectors

"A great boutique bead shop with the best prices and quality in downtown Miami — combined with wonderful customer service. The owners are always ready to answer questions and go out of their way to help. I’ve been coming here for years and I’ll keep coming back."

J
Jennifer R.
Jewelry designer · Miami, FL

"I ordered bracelets from their Etsy shop and they were even more beautiful in person. Super affordable and the quality was excellent. This place is the real deal — wholesale prices with the personal service of a local shop. Highly recommend to any jewelry maker."

M
Maria C.
Craft maker · Miami, FL
